subject: Sign the card for Presidents’ Day >
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
This is your chance to say thanks for all President Trump has accomplished. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjbaBAGiBAHZ48CJ~OmaF2RrDRMN6aaaaF2RrBMKWGG8a?l=~@sGv90E&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=S&6=&i=9t~r-yHg0V1ZmVwk11mR71lR0UHUsTHaoTHgHgHYo1n&gHg)

Friend,

President Trump has been working day and night to put our country back on the right track.

And the more he succeeds, the more the media attacks him.

_But he 's not letting the media stop him. _He will not rest until we Make America Great Again!

**In honor of Presidents ' Day, we're asking all of our early supporters to sign our card by 6:00 PM tonight to show him just how many people are behind our movement.**
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjbaBAGiBAHZ48CJ~OmaF2RrDRMN6aaaaF2RrBMKWGG8a?l=~@sGv90E&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=W&6=&i=9t~r-yHg0V1ZmVwk11mR71lR0UHUsTHaoTHgHgHYo1n&gHg)
**[Please sign the card by 6:00 PM tonight to get him a list of all of our supporters in time.](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjbaBAGiBAHZ48CJ~OmaF2RrDRMN6aaaaF2RrBMKWGG8a?l=~@sGv90E&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=T&6=&i=9t~r-yHg0V1ZmVwk11mR71lR0UHUsTHaoTHgHgHYo1n&gHg) **

President Trump continues to fight off fake news from the media. He will not let it stop him. He understands that nothing matters more than the American people who power our movement.

_While the media continues its barrage of attacks against President Trump, your signature will show him that the Trump Train is stronger now than EVER before._

**[Please sign Donald Trump's Presidents' Day Card by 6:00 PM tonight.](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjbaBAGiBAHZ48CJ~OmaF2RrDRMN6aaaaF2RrBMKWGG8a?l=~@sGv90E&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=U&6=&i=9t~r-yHg0V1ZmVwk11mR71lR0UHUsTHaoTHgHgHYo1n&gHg) **

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

****[SIGN THE CARD](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecjbaBAGiBAHZ48CJ~OmaF2RrDRMN6aaaaF2RrBMKWGG8a?l=~@sGv90E&V=mg5ZucrjDy_pdjZu.Txd&u=V&6=&i=9t~r-yHg0V1ZmVwk11mR71lR0UHUsTHaoTHgHgHYo1n&gHg)****

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Russ Feingold
subject: Push back against Trump's reckless agenda
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
body:
Stand against Trump's dangerous anti-environment agenda.
|
Friend, Thank you for being a part of my campaign. Living under the new Donald Trump administration means protecting the environment is now one of our country's biggest challenges -- from fighting efforts to destroy the clean energy industry, to protecting clean air and drinking water for millions of Americans and keeping our public lands out of the hands of Big Polluters.

**Combating the Trump-Ryan-McConnell agenda won 't be easy.** That's why I'm so relieved that the League of Conservation Voters is on the front lines against their anti-environment attacks. But _they can 't do it alone_.

[Please, add your name today: Stand against Trump's dangerous anti-environment agenda.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/3547541/3894537278/VEsH/ "https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3723&autologin=true")

Thank you so much for all that you've done -- and for standing against Trump in the fight ahead.

Russ Feingold

* * *

| |
---|---
| **Stand Up to Trump 's Anti-Environmental Agenda:**
|
| _On the campaign trail Trump constantly talked about rolling back the gains we 've made in the fight against climate change. Let's make sure Trump hears from Us. We will not accept an agenda that sacrifices the planet for profits._

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/3547541/3894537278/VEsE/ "https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3723&autologin=true") |
Friend, -- **We though the new Trump administration was going to be bad ...but not this bad.**

Days after taking power, Donald Trump cancelled a federal conference on the health impacts of climate change, put a freeze on EPA funding and federal hiring, and signed executive orders advancing the dangerous Keystone XL and Dakota Access Pipelines.

This is in addition to his pro-polluter team of cabinet nominees and promises to eliminate the Clean Power Plan and back out of the Paris Climate Agreement. **He 's only just getting started and we're already seeing the effects of his radical anti-environment agenda!**

Now more than ever, we need stand strong together like we did at last month's Women's March and fight back against Trump's nightmarish plans. **LCV is putting all its resources to build a network of engaged citizens that will push back against Trump 's radical agenda. Will you join us?**

[STAND TOGETHER: We won't let Trump and Big Polluter insiders to get away with their awful plans for the environment »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/3547541/3894537278/VEsF/ "https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3723&autologin=true")

Trump has already fulfilled his promise to greenlight the Keystone and Dakota Access Pipelines, and we can only expect him to move forward on his promise to pull out of the Paris Climate Agreement and gut our most vital environmental protections.

His cabinet is not any better former ExxonMobil CEO Rex Tillerson is our nation's newest Secretary of State and climate skeptic Scott Pruitt might be confirmed as soon as next week! **Trump and his administration are a menace to everything we 've worked for. **

People who care about breathing clean air and drinking clean water, who are worried about the dangers of climate change, and who want to save our planet must rally together and fight back harder than ever!

[Climate change is no "hoax:" Don't let Trump kill climate progress »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/3547541/3894537278/VEsC/ "https://secure3.convio.net/lcv/site/Advocacy?cmd=display&page=UserAction&id=3723&autologin=true")

Let's build a people-powered movement to protect our environment from Trump's disastrous plans! Thank you for standing up to Donald Trump's dangerous, anti-environment agenda.

Sincerely,

Kristin Brown
Director of Digital Strategy
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/354757e/3894537278/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/354757f/3894537278/VEsA/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/354757c/3894537278/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf46aa/1c469400/29e82ac/354757d/3894537278/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Cole Leystra, Middleton, WI, Treasurer
---

Middleton, WI 53562
